abilities.name: Time Means Nothing
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Chromatic Shard now increases the target's spell damage taken by 10% for 30 seconds.

abilities.name: Erasion
abilities.desc: Increases the chance to trigger Anomaly Spikes by 5% and their damage by 20%.

abilities.name: Timerend
abilities.desc: Transforms your Wand of Time into Timerend.TimerendRend the fabric of time, dealing 36 Chromatic Damage over 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Aeon Rend
abilities.desc: Your Chromatic Shard now has a 25% chance to strike again and incur no cooldown.

abilities.name: Resonance
abilities.desc: Casting Artificer's Wand or Crystal Cannon now has a 35% chance to reduce the cooldown of Hasten by -1 sec.

abilities.name: Incarnation of Chaos
abilities.desc: Transform into an Incarnate of Chaos, instantly resetting the cooldown of Chromatic Shard and causing your next cast to not incur a cooldown.In addition, your damage dealt is increased by 15% for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Black Hole
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Chromatic Shard, Melt Reality and Unmake by 15% against slowed enemies.

abilities.name: Chaotic Time
abilities.desc: While Incarnation of Chaos is active, your Melt Reality deals 30% increased damage and replicates an additional 20% In addition, periodic damage dealt now has a 5% chance to reduce the cooldown of Incarnation of Chaos by -1 sec.

abilities.name: Infinite Keeper
abilities.desc: Using Unmake on an enemy affected by your Timerend now causes the enemy to erupt in a vortex of sand, dealing 81 Chromatic Damage every 1 sec to up to 8 enemies for 6 seconds in an 8 yd radius.

abilities.name: Anomaly Spikes
abilities.desc: Periodic damage dealt now has a 8% chance to launch an Anomaly Spike at your target.Anomaly SpikeDeals cond(gt(SPA, SPS), 161*1+SPA*0.25, 161*1+SPS*0.25) Chromatic Damage.

abilities.name: Infinite Horizon
abilities.desc: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, your Unmake and Timerend gain an additional 20% bonus spell scaling.

abilities.name: Shifting Chaos
abilities.desc: Your Chromatic Shard and Anomaly Spikes now deal an additional 20% their damage dealt as Chromatic Damage all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Rippling Power
abilities.desc: Increases your Spirit by 8%.

abilities.name: Distorted Time
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Timerend by -2 sec and increases the duration of Decomposition by 3 sec.

abilities.name: Archaeology
abilities.desc: Your Discovery now also generates 3% of your base mana and health.

abilities.name: Temporal Convergence
abilities.desc: Your Wand of Time now has a 40% chance to reset its own cooldown.

abilities.name: Borrowed Time
abilities.desc: Taking Physical damage now heals you equal to 10% of the damage dealt. Can only occur once per sec.

abilities.name: Paradox Cannon
abilities.desc: Continuum SpellGenerate 1 Echo Fragment every 3 sec for 5 seconds, plus an additional 5 sec per Echo Fragment consumed.Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

abilities.name: Unstable Chronoglass
abilities.desc: Place an Unstable Chronoglass at target location for 30 seconds that will redirect the next 3 offensive enemy spell casts onto itself.

abilities.name: Splitting Time
abilities.desc: Your Crystal Cannon now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

abilities.name: The Vast Infinite
abilities.desc: All party and raid members become one, equally sharing 25% of all damage dealt to them for 10 seconds, up to a maximum of 100% of their total health.At the end of the duration, all affected allies are healed equal to the total damage shared split evenly amongst all allies.

abilities.name: Time Wizard
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your Reverse Wound, Epoch, and Correct the Mistake by 8%.

abilities.name: Timeline Tether
abilities.desc: Your periodic damage and healing reduces the cooldown of your Fortify Timeline by -1 sec.

abilities.name: Time Beacon
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of effects applied by your Aeons by 4 sec.

abilities.name: Keep Accelerating
abilities.desc: Your Accelerated Recovery now applies to an additional nearby target.

abilities.name: Epic Recovery
abilities.desc: When you cast Epoch you now also cast a Rank 1 Epoch on up to 5 allies affected by Accelerated Recovery.

abilities.name: The Bieko Effect
abilities.desc: While Hasten is active the cooldowns of Dimensional Divergence, Temporal Anomaly, and Temporal Focus are reduced by 10% every 2 sec.

abilities.name: Charm of Power
abilities.desc: Increases the damage dealt by Gravity Bomb by 50%.

abilities.name: Timeless
abilities.desc: While Endless Sands is active, the mana costs of your spells and abilities is reduced by -3% per stack.

abilities.name: Entropy Reversal
abilities.desc: Reduces the duration of disease effects by -40%.

abilities.name: Hourglass of Eternity
abilities.desc: Periodic damage dealt now has a 5% chance to grant you 25% increased haste for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Expediting Time
abilities.desc: Reduces the channel time of your Time Out! by -40%.

abilities.name: Ahead of the Game
abilities.desc: Every 10th instance of your damage dealt or healing now gives you 60 increased spell power for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Mass Babify
abilities.desc: Instantly transform all enemies into a baby, preventing them from acting for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players), damage dealt will interrupt this effect. While babified, enemies will rapidly regenerate health. Scales with modifiers to Babify.

abilities.name: Chaos Omen
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of your Gravity Bomb by -30 sec, and its explosion occurs -3 sec faster.

abilities.name: Perfect Timing
abilities.desc: Increases your haste by 4% and reduces your spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35%.

abilities.name: Fortify Timeline
abilities.desc: Fortify the current timeline, instantly healing all party and raid members for 100 + 40% SP and extending the duration of Accelerated Recovery on them by 5 sec.

abilities.name: Gift of the Timeways
abilities.desc: Casting Melt Reality now causes your Timerend and Unmake's periodic damage to benefit from haste for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Destabilize Time
abilities.desc: Reduces enemy casting speed by -10% for 20 seconds, increasing by -10% every time they cast.Gaining stacks does not extend the duration of the spell.

abilities.name: Concentrated Fate
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Echo Fragments by 20%.

abilities.name: Elder Wand
abilities.desc: Your Wand attacks now have a 30% chance to increase the damage of Artificer's Wand against the target by 3% for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: Discovery
abilities.desc: Casting Artificers's Wand and Wand of Time now grants Discovery for 30 seconds, stacking 4 times. DiscoveryAt 3 stacks, your next Wand of Time or Artificer's Wand causes an additional 1 + 21.2% arcane SP + 25% Spirit + 10% ranged AP Arcane Damage, scaling with Spirit.

abilities.name: Through The Aeons
abilities.desc: Activating an Aeon now increases your mana regeneration from Spirit by 100% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Desynchronization
abilities.desc: Shift an enemy out of sync with the present, causing their grip to fail, disarming their melee and ranged weapons for 6 seconds.Upon removal, they are resynced, preventing them from regenerating their health for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Improved Reverse Wound
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Reverse Wound by -0.3 sec.

abilities.name: Temporal Focus
abilities.desc: You lock yourself into a perfect moment, removing and becoming immune to banish, silence, and interrupt effects for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Carbon Dating
abilities.desc: Each stack of Sands of Time now also increases the healing of your Epoch by 10%.

abilities.name: Endless Sands
abilities.desc: Casting Epoch now grants you Endless Sands.Endless SandsCast time of your next Reverse Wounds within 15 seconds is reduced by -20%, stacking up to 5 times.

abilities.name: Cycling Aeons
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of your Aeons by -50%.

abilities.name: Aeon of Oblivion
abilities.desc: Increases Epoch's mana cost by 30%, critical strike chance by 10%, and healing done by 15%. In addition, healing with Epoch now increases the target's damage dealt by 3% for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Paradox
abilities.desc: Casting Melt Reality now causes your next Unmake or Reverse Wound within 6 seconds to become instant and cost -50% less mana.

abilities.name: Eternal
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of your Accelerated Recovery by 6 sec and Decomposition by 3 sec.

abilities.name: Melt Reality
abilities.desc: Melt the target's reality, dealing cond(gt(SPFR, SPS), 48+0+SPFR*0.23, 48+0+SPS*0.23) Chromatic Damage every 3 sec for 30 seconds.While active, periodic damage dealt to the target is replicated for 20% of the value to all enemies near them.

abilities.name: Chromatic Shard
abilities.desc: Fling a shard of chaos at an enemy, dealing 209 + 150% SP Chromatic Damage, piercing immunities and resistances.Dealing damage with Anomaly Spikes reduces the cast time of this ability by -10% for 30 seconds, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: Slipstream
abilities.desc: Target an enemy and slip them into a pocket dimension for 5 seconds, banishing them and making them immune to damage.Activate this ability again before the duration expires to choose a new location to place that enemy within 20 yds.

abilities.name: Warpstriker
abilities.desc: Reduces the cost of your spells by -5% and the chance for your spells to be dispelled by 10%.

abilities.name: Entropy Overload
abilities.desc: Increases your chance to resist movement slowing effects by 20%.

abilities.name: Artificer's Empowerment
abilities.desc: Increases your Spirit by 8%.

abilities.name: Converge the Infinite
abilities.desc: Casting Fortify Timeline now grants you Converge the Infinite.Converge the InfiniteYour next Correct the Mistake has a 1 sec increased cast time, but heals for 30% more and is guaranteed to critically strike.Successfully healing an ally in this way reduces the cooldown of Fortify Timeline by 8%.

abilities.name: Caverns of Time
abilities.desc: Your Discordance now generates 1 Echo Fragment.

abilities.name: Singularity Core
abilities.desc: Continuum SpellEmpower your Wand attacks to deal an additional 50% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 2 + 25% SP + 12% ranged AP additional Arcane damage for 3 sec plus 5 sec per Echo Fragment.Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

abilities.name: Aether Compression
abilities.desc: Continuum SpellArtificer's Wand and Reverse Wound can be cast while moving for 5 seconds.Duration increased by 5 sec per Echo Fragment.Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

abilities.name: Arc Collision
abilities.desc: Distortion SpellCreate a timestorm around an enemy that causes them and up to 2 nearby enemies to take 270 + 24% SP Arcane damage, repeating over 4 seconds. Duration increased by 2 sec for each Echo Fragment consumed.

abilities.name: Cheating Time
abilities.desc: Casting Shatter Echo now extends the duration of your Flux Emitter by 4 sec.Cannot be extended beyond maximum duration.

abilities.name: Luck
abilities.desc: Allows 40% of your mana regeneration to continue while in combat.

abilities.name: Continuum Restoration
abilities.desc: Restore the continuum at target location for all allies and enemies, removing all beneficial magic effects from enemies and harmful magic effects from allies.This dispel is potent enough to remove magic effects that are normally undispellable

abilities.name: Fate Twister
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Unstable Chronoglass by -30 sec.

abilities.name: Infinite Shield
abilities.desc: Shield an ally with 10 charges of Infinite Shield for 30 seconds. Each time they take damage, they will be healed for 190 + 25% SP and lose 1 charge.Can only occur once per sec and can only affect 1 target at a time.

abilities.name: Infinity
abilities.desc: Removes the cooldown of Infinite Shield.

abilities.name: Impeccable Timing
abilities.desc: Your periodic damage and healing effects can now critically strike.

abilities.name: Magic Erosion
abilities.desc: Your Decomposition now applies Magic Erosion to the target, increasing attackers chance to hit the target with spells by 3% for 30 seconds.

abilities.name: Clocked In
abilities.desc: Casting Discordance now makes your next Artificer's Wand within 10 seconds instant cast and causes it to generate an additional Echo Fragment.

abilities.name: Aeon of Protection
abilities.desc: Increases Epoch's cast time by 15%, healing done by 15%, and causes it to apply a damage absorption shield equal to 30% of the amount healed for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Aeon of Renewal
abilities.desc: Reduces Epoch's healing by -30%, but causes it to heal for an additional 50% of the amount healed over 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Mind Over Matter
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Wisdom spells by 20%.

abilities.name: Timeblender
abilities.desc: Guarantees healing done by Fabric of Time to critically strike and gives it an additional charge.Fabric of Time (Timeblender)2 Charges, 15 sec rechargeAlter the fabric of time, healing an ally for 529 + 64% healing.Your next Aeon used within 8 seconds will trigger with no cooldown.

abilities.name: Excruciating Discord
abilities.desc: Your Discordances used with Chronological are now guaranteed to critically strike.

abilities.name: Timelost Power
abilities.desc: Your Discordance now strikes 3 additional enemies.

abilities.name: Artificer's Wand
abilities.desc: Transforms your Unmake into Artificer's Wand.Artificer's WandFocus to unleash 2 wand attacks dealing Ranged Weapon damage plus 5 over 1 seconds.Generates 1 Echo Fragment.

abilities.name: Fabric of Time
abilities.desc: Alter the fabric of time, healing an ally for 158 + 64% healing.Your next Aeon used within 8 seconds will trigger with no cooldown or cost.

abilities.name: Sands of Life
abilities.desc: Increases your healing power by 25% of your Spirit.

abilities.name: Correct the Mistake
abilities.desc: Retell the fate of party members within 30 yds, healing them for 91 + 68.57% healing.

abilities.name: Shimmering Shard
abilities.desc: Activating Aeon spells now grants you 4% increased damage and healing for 20 seconds, stacking 3 times.

abilities.name: Time Skip
abilities.desc: Your Roll Back now removes 1 additional harmful effect.

abilities.name: Wonders of Time
abilities.desc: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3%.Does not stack with similar effects.Additionally, all healing done now has a 10% chance to grant you Endless Sands.Endless SandsCast time of your next Reverse Wounds within 15 seconds is reduced by -20%, stacking up to 5 times.

abilities.name: Infinity Crash
abilities.desc: Increases the critical damage of Discordance and Chromatic Shard by 50%.

abilities.name: Deconstruction
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Unmake by 5%.

abilities.name: Cadence of Time
abilities.desc: Your critical strikes with Epoch now grant Cadence of Time, increasing the healing of Ripple by 10% for 15 seconds. Stacks 5 times.

abilities.name: Shield of the Ages
abilities.desc: When hit by a damaging critical strike, your damage taken is reduced by -3%, and healing received is increased by 5% for 3 seconds, stacking 3 times.

abilities.name: Dimensional Divergence
abilities.desc: Swap places with a target.If they're an enemy, you steal -80% of their movement speed for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Clasp of Infinity
abilities.desc: Conjure a magical binding upon an enemy that bounces to nearby enemies, rooting them in place for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Hyperwand
abilities.desc: Increases the damage and critical damage of your Shatter Echo by 30%.

abilities.name: Temporal Dissonance
abilities.desc: Chronostasis now slows your target's movement speed by an additional -10%.

abilities.name: Wand Master
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Wand of Time and Artificer's Wand by 10%.

abilities.name: Gravity Bomb
abilities.desc: Place a gravity bomb on the target. After 6 seconds they explode for 979 + 120% SP + 30% ranged AP Chromatic Damage in a 10 yds radius.Directly before the explosion occurs, all enemies within 15 yds are teleported to the initial target.

abilities.name: Temporal Anomaly
abilities.desc: Augment reality for 10 seconds, causing 50% of the damage taken to be absorbed and converted into healing at the end of the duration.

abilities.name: Buy Time
abilities.desc: Put all enemies and allies in an 8 yd radius in target area into a stasis, banishing them for 6 seconds, making them invulnerable to all effects but unable to move.Casting Unmake on a target will remove this effect.

abilities.name: Orderly Protector
abilities.desc: Healing done by your Epoch now increases the healing of Fabric of Time by 10% for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times.Each stack gives you a 2% chance when you cast Fabric of Time to reset its own cooldown.

abilities.name: Bronze Echoes
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Artificer's Wand by -0.2 sec.

abilities.name: Timeguard
abilities.desc: Place a magical guard on an ally for 2 minutes, causing the next 3 instances of direct damage that would reduce the target below 35% health to deal 40% less damage.

abilities.name: Constant Recovery
abilities.desc: Healing done by Reverse Wound now increases all healing taken the target receives by 6% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Accelerated Recovery
abilities.desc: Accelerates the bodies natural healing process, healing the target for 60 + 115% healing over 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Unearthed Pools
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Unmake by -15% and reduces the mana cost of your instant spells by 10%.

abilities.name: Magic Sensitivity
abilities.desc: Critical strikes with Shatter Echo now increases the enemy's damage taken from you by 10% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Chronological
abilities.desc: Every 20 sec, your next Discordance within 10 seconds is instant cast.

abilities.name: Mark of Order
abilities.desc: Healing done by Fortify Timeline now applies Mark of Order.Mark of OrderIncreases the healing of your next Reverse Wound on the target by 10% for 20 seconds. Every 1 sec for the duration, they gain an additional stack of this effect, up to 5.

abilities.name: Conduction Burst
abilities.desc: Your Shatter Echo now deals 20% additional damage while a Continuum spell is active.

abilities.name: Waves of Time
abilities.desc: Blast enemies in a frontal cone with time fractals, knocking them back slightly.The knockback repeats 1 additional time after 2 sec.

abilities.name: Flux Emitter
abilities.desc: Continuum SpellEmpower Wand attacks to affect up to 2 additional nearby enemies for 3 sec plus 5 sec per Echo Fragment. Affected attacks deal less damage per additional enemy hit.Can only have 1 Continuum spell active at a time.

abilities.name: Hands of Time
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Accelerate and Decelerate spells by 25%.

abilities.name: Pulse Driver
abilities.desc: Singularity Core now increases the damage of Shatter Echo while its active by 30% and allows Shatter Echo to trigger its damage.

abilities.name: Wand Mastery
abilities.desc: Wand of Time and Shatter Echo now have a 25% chance to unleash Crystal Cannon, launching 2 quick lesser Wand auto attacks at the enemy over 1 seconds, scaling with Spirit.While Paradox Cannon is active, the chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10%.

abilities.name: A Ripple In Time
abilities.desc: Your damaging and healing critical strikes now reduce the remaining cooldown of Ripple by -1 sec.

abilities.name: Displacement
abilities.desc: Displaces a party or raid member and pulls them to you, dispelling root and snare effects from them.

abilities.name: Ideal Time
abilities.desc: Every 30 sec, your next ability is guaranteed to critically strike.

abilities.name: Chronicler
abilities.desc: Casting Fortify Timeline now extends the duration of Accelerated Recovery on all targets within 40 yds by an additional 10 sec.

abilities.name: Null Orbs
abilities.desc: Periodic critical damage dealt now has a 20% chance to grant Null Orbs for 15 seconds.Null Orbs (Proc)Increases the critical damage of Chromatic Shard and Anomaly Spikes based on your spell critical strike rating.Critically striking with Chromatic Shard removes your Null Orbs.

abilities.name: Timemage
abilities.desc: Reduces the duration of harmful magic effects on you by -30%.

abilities.name: Mind Melt
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Melt Reality now also reduces the target's primary attributes by -3% for 15 sec, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Ripple
abilities.desc: Channel for up to 5 seconds. When the channel ends, if you channeled for at least 1.5 sec, allies within 40 yds are healed based on the duration of the channel.While channeling, you are immune to stun effects.

abilities.name: Shatter Echo
abilities.desc: Distortion SpellLaunch a distorted echo from your wand at an enemy, dealing 90% Ranged Weapon damage plus cond(gt(SPA, SPH), 4+0+SPA*0.3, 4+0+SPH*0.3) Arcane damage.Damage increased by 40% for each Echo Fragment consumed.

abilities.name: Infinity Stone
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3%.

abilities.name: Threads of Eternity
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Discordance now applies Thread of Eternity to enemies.Thread of EternityMarked for 6 seconds. Damage taken from Wand of Time is increased by 30%.You may consume this debuff with Wand of Time to gain an additional effect based on your active Continuum Spell.Singularity Core: Triggers 3 instances of Singularity Core damage.Flux Emitter: Explodes on the enemy, dealing 50% of the damage dealt to all enemies within 8 yds.Paradox Cannon: Increases the damage of your next Shatter Echo within 6 sec by 25%.

abilities.name: Crown of Power
abilities.desc: Increases the tick rate of Melt Reality by -25%.

abilities.name: Life Cycles
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of your Babify by 0.25 sec and its mana cost by -15%.

abilities.name: Unearthed Power
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Anomaly Spikes now also increases your damage and critical strike chance with Chromatic Shard by 6% per stack.

abilities.name: Infinite Sands
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Infinite Clone by -60 sec.

abilities.name: Chaos Fusion / Pure Chaos
abilities.desc: While Incarnation of Chaos is active, you may now cast Chromatic Shard while moving, but the duration of Incarnation of Chaos is reduced by -3 sec.

abilities.name: End of Time / Eternity
abilities.desc: At the end of the duration of Clasp of Infinity, you launch an Anomaly Spike at affected enemies and their damage dealt is reduced by -10% for 4 seconds.Anomaly SpikeDeals cond(gt(SPA, SPS), 161*1+SPA*0.25, 161*1+SPS*0.25) Chromatic Damage.

abilities.name: Unmaker of Realities / Maker of Realities
abilities.desc: While Hasten is active the ally now has a 25% chance when they deal damage to strike the target an additional time equal to 30% of the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Timekeeper / Procrastination
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Timeguard by 25%.

abilities.name: Timewalking / Tripping the Rift
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Waves of Time by -4 sec.

abilities.name: Nozdormu's Gaze / Titan's Gaze
abilities.desc: Your Time Out! now regenerates -2% less mana per tick, but casting it now instantly restores 15% of your maximum mana.

abilities.name: Overcorrection / Bronze Timeways
abilities.desc: Overhealing done by Correct the Mistake now applies a heal over time effect to the ally equal to 30% of the healing done over 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Sporadic Incantations / Tamed Incantations
abilities.desc: Your Flux Emitter now strikes 1 additional enemy.

abilities.name: Reverse Engineering / Erode Armaments
abilities.desc: Periodic damage and healing now has a 15% chance to increase your haste by 15% for 6 seconds and grant allies Replenishment.ReplenishmentRestores 1% maximum mana every 5 sec to allies within 100 yds for 15 seconds.
